adapted_from.boundary: Adopt the controlled failure-learning pattern only. This project does not auto-modify workflows, durable memory, external resources or repository state from proposals.

purpose: Extend diagnostics from root-cause repair into controlled learning: repeated or high-impact failures can create postmortems, improvement proposals, regression guards and promotion decisions instead of ending at a captured issue.

upstream_inputs: Canvas visual and screenshot audit reports
does_not_own: overwriting source truth or historical issue records

open_when_any: A same failure class recurs after a captured repair.
A system_upgrade has high or critical recurrence risk.
A validator or review gate falsely passed a defect that matters to future work.
A user correction reveals a diagnostic self-audit issue.
A change would modify prompts, routes, schemas, validators, workflow definitions, Canvas policies, source-quality gates or memory policy.
do_not_open_when_all: The issue is a one-off local artifact repair.
The owner layer was clear and the repair added a sufficient validator or review gate.
No reusable method, regression case or future proposal is needed.

pipeline.input: Captured issue, review finding, validation failure, screenshot defect, user correction or repeated local repair.
pipeline.gate: Must reference evidence paths and owner layer.
Must name affected objects, root cause, evidence refs and recommended actions.

pipeline.input: failure_postmortem plus current capability or closure signals
pipeline.gate: Must state proposed change, expected gain, risk level, required regression evidence and rollback plan.
Must not mutate durable truth; use isolated branch, generated report or manual review when needed.

pipeline.input: proposal plus sandbox or dry-run results
pipeline.gate: Must run required validators, evals, screenshot audits or human review notes before promotion.

pipeline.output: approved, rejected, deferred or rolled_back decision
pipeline.gate: High-risk or governance changes require explicit human approval.

pipeline.output: route update, rule update, validator update, review criterion, loop queue item or memory candidate
pipeline.gate: Durable memory writeback remains gated; chat memory alone is not closure.

forbidden_change_types: promote exact incident as generic rule without abstraction
treat Canvas coordinates as machine truth
skip visual projection after structure upgrade
skip diagnostics for confirmed systemic defect
promote unreviewed source into knowledge truth
make Markdown the system behavior truth
leave machine map unsynced after module change

risk_policy.low: May be closed with validators and local evidence.
risk_policy.medium: Requires issue queue evidence plus relevant validator or review record.
risk_policy.high: Requires regression guard and explicit user-visible summary before promotion.
risk_policy.critical: Requires human approval before any durable policy, schema, validator or workflow promotion.

storage_policy.current_state: This file defines the loop contract. Concrete postmortem/proposal queues are deferred until repeated failures require durable instances.
